references.key: therefore at most n 1 subsequent minibatches may enter the pipeline after b
references.raw: (Pipeline injection limit) Stage 0 injects at most n minibatches before the first backward signal is received. Therefore, at most n − 1 subsequent minibatches may enter the pipeline after b.
references.title: Therefore, at most n − 1 subsequent minibatches may enter the pipeline after b

references.raw: (Pipeline propagation limit) The backward pass of b must traverse the downstream stages d − 1, d − 2, . . . , i + 1 before reaching stage i. During this interval, stage i can process at most one forward pass per downstre
references.title: , i + 1 before reaching stage i
